description: A compensation analyst needs a quarterly dashboard backend. Create three materialized views in the HR schema using 'BUILD IMMEDIATE' and 'REFRESH COMPLETE ON DEMAND' to pre-compute salary analytics. MV_DEPT_COMP_SUMMARY must group by department and include columns for DEPARTMENT_ID, DEPARTMENT_NAME, EMPLOYEE_COUNT, AVG_SALARY (2 decimal places), MIN_SALARY, MAX_SALARY, MEDIAN_SALARY, and TOTAL_PAYROLL. MV_JOB_SALARY_BANDS must group by job and include columns for JOB_ID, JOB_TITLE, EMPLOYEE_COUNT, AVG_SALARY (2 decimal places), MIN_SALARY, MAX_SALARY, and SALARY_SPREAD (max-min). MV_HIRE_DECADE_STATS must group by hire decade (e.g., '1990s', '2000s') and include columns for HIRE_DECADE, EMPLOYEE_COUNT, AVG_SALARY, MIN_SALARY, and MAX_SALARY. Additionally, create a PL/SQL procedure named REFRESH_COMP_VIEWS that refreshes all three views in the order listed. Export the contents of all three views to /home/ga/Desktop/compensation_benchmark.txt.
